---
title: "San Pedro Loop (39% Cycleway)"
---



```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="Richmond" data-miles="35.68" data-elevation="1584.32" data-time="201" data-has-gravel="false">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/san-pedro-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>Richmond</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>35.68</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elev. Gain</span><br>1584.32 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Time</span><br>~3:20</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Steep Descent</span><br>0.11 mi</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br><span class="mobile-route-quality" style="background-color:#fee08b;">32%</span></p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Hazards

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/san-pedro-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Flat</td>
      <td>32.02</td>
      <td>90.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>1.01</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Light Descent</td>
      <td>0.96</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.86</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>0.73</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Descent</td>
      <td>0.11</td>
      <td>0.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

## Climbs

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/san-pedro-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

::: {.panel-tabset}
<<<<<<< HEAD
=======

>>>>>>> de17f9223efdd740c55d9891e15e6bda41d4390c
### Climbs Only

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>207</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Merrydale Road (3% avg)</td>
      <td>207</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

### With Rest Periods

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Section (avg grade)</th>
      <th>Climb (ft)</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>207</td>
      <td>35.7</td>
      <td>201 ± 64</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>22.1</td>
      <td>124</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>1. Merrydale Road (3% avg)</td>
      <td>207</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>8 ± 4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>flat or descent</td>
      <td></td>
      <td>12.7</td>
      <td>69</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/san-pedro-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

```{=html}
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Cycleway</td>
      <td>14.1</td>
      <td>39.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>5.5</td>
      <td>15.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>4.6</td>
      <td>12.9</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>3.8</td>
      <td>10.6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>3.0</td>
      <td>8.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
      <td>5.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Failed</td>
      <td>0.8</td>
      <td>2.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>0.5</td>
      <td>1.3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>0.6</td>
      <td>1.7</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
```

:::
